landing.title: Your pocket reset for study stress

choose.title: Choose Your Mood
choose.sos.desc: Quick reset for exam panic and study stress
choose.planner.desc: Organize your thoughts and daily tasks
sos.tapToTrace: Trace the ring with your finger to begin
sos.hint: Follow the ring and let Blunno guide your breath.
sos.hintTrace: Move your finger clockwise around the ring · breathe slowly.
planner.title: Planner
planner.empty: No tasks for today. Add one above!
planner.limitHint: Blunno limits your day to {max} essential tasks to prevent study overwhelm. Focus on what truly matters.

offline.text: Blunno works offline. But this page needs a connection.
seo.defaultTitle: Blunno – Pocket reset for study stress
